base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of triforce_assembly_animation — a effect_layer from 1986 legend of zelda. Triforce-of-Wisdom assembly — 9-frame build as each of 8 dungeon fragments locks into place. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Triforce-of-Wisdom assembly — 9-frame build as each of 8 dungeon fragments locks into place; plays on Level 9 unlock after collecting all 8
